name: agentify-marketplace
description: Marketplace hosting the agentify plugin: a configurable bootstrap that installs a production-grade agentic harness on Claude Code repositories.

plugins.name: agentify
plugins.description: Bootstrap a production-grade agentic harness on any Claude Code repository. Configurable via agentify-config.schema.json (company, skill prefix, plugin name, marketplace URL, fleet size, loop path root, ticket prefix). Provides /agt-config, /agt-loop, /agt-upgrade, /agt-self-improve, /agt-feedback skills (prefix configurable per target).
